description: SHADE NAMEMarbleSUITABLE FOR WHICH SKIN TYPE?Suitable for all skin typesWHAT IT IS? A high-performance foundation that lets you look flawless through your work day.WHAT IT DOES?Boosted with a mattifying formula, it gives your skin a translucent and resplendent glow and its active properties blend into the skin beautifully to give you a natural appearance without looking overly made-upThe easy to use pump dispenser allows you to pump out the perfect amount required for adequate coverageThis long-lasting formula does not streak or smudgeFEATURESLong lasting & mattifyingPump dispenserMatte finishLong staySuitable for all Indian skin tonesABOUT THE COLLECTIONLooking flawless is now an everyday affair. Lakme 9 to 5 Flawless Make-Up is the perfect foundation for a diva who likes to look like perfection all day long. Use this foundation and be assured of no more touch-ups and a flawless complexion from sunrise to sunset.ABOUT THE BRANDLakme is India's No.1 color cosmetics brand offering a wide range of high-end, world-class color cosmetics and skincare products. Lakme has a vast product range specially crafted by experts for the Indian skin. The brand has also been redefining fashion in India with Lakme Fashion Week, India's premier fashion event.
